transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverbend Health scheduling line. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Alvarez. I can't make Thursday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem. Can I get your full name and date of birth to pull up the appointment?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Nathan Pierce, born March 4th, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Nathan. I see your appointment Thursday at 2 PM with Dr. Alvarez. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could we do sometime next week, maybe Tuesday morning?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check. Dr. Alvarez has an opening next Tuesday at 9:30 AM. Does that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, you're all set for Tuesday the 14th at 9:30 AM. You'll get a text reminder the day before.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Nathan. Anything else I can help with today?
